comment.body:
so the thing is that the line is slowly becoming a support.
mechanical simply, not liquidity wise.
and this is why i marked the following 1.5 hours window as the pivotal in that terms.
bcs if it is trending still above that line, today's gonna be fill the gap and just burn volatility. and tomorrow it is likely to take some of these gains back, drawing a rangebound pattern, we'll see today, premarket.
as said, volatility is gonna be sold/managed. we have a mild vomma supply, ensuring a stairstep decay case for spot.
intraday trading in an environment like this is very risky, bcs of the theta.
I like my futures positions better, i hold them, and only use options for swings when the momentum is confirmed.
but as said, for this week, it is more like a stabiliation one step lower, in general.

my next risk target is friday-opex week window, as said.
re-read the weekly post pls
